x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Who is allowed to use incentives.

Comment:
Example: Only active accounts can redeem.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Minimum Redemption Threshold Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Minimum balance required to burn.

Comment:
Example: At least 1,000 points required.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Conversion Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
How incentives convert to value.

Comment:
Example: 100 points = $1 cashback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Redemption Method Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
How incentives can be used.

Comment:
Example: Cashback, voucher, transfer, fee waiver.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Fee and Charge Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Any fees applied during redemption.

Comment
Example: $5 processing fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Reversal Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
When a burn transaction may be reversed.

Comment:
Example: Failed voucher delivery reinstates points.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Limit and Cap Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maximum redemption per day or month.
